subcodes.title: On the creation of the world:  words to Miss St. and others in summer of 1910
subcodes.first_line: Wir haben wohl alle heute etwas Zeit, über dieses ebenso schwierige wie wichtige Thema zu reden und der Ort
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @evolution; human evolution, @creation of the world, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @relationship of the soul to the body, @soul; spirit after death, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God
